query: SELECT id, userId, sessionDate, dayLabel, createdAt FROM workout_sessions WHERE sessionDate BETWEEN '2026-05-10' AND '2026-05-16' ORDER BY sessionDate, userId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT id, userId, sessionDate, dayLabel, createdAt FROM workout_sessions WHERE sessionDate BETWEEN '2026-05-10' AND '2026-05-16' ORDER BY sessionDate, userId;
